parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { success: true, action: 'get_system_info', data: { instance_url: ($('⚙️ Config').first().json.instanceUrl || 'http://localhost:5678').replace(/\/+$/, ''), api_base: ($('⚙️ Config').first().json.instanceUrl || 'http://localhost:5678').replace(/\/+$/, '') + '/api/v1', api_version: 'v1', timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), environment: $execution.mode, workflow_id: $workflow.id, workflow_name: $workflow.name, execution_id: $execution.id, total_endpoints: 29 } } }];
